allow: Bash(sed -i 's/^reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = \\["json"\\] }$/reqwest = { workspace = true }/' crates/agent/Cargo.toml)
Bash(sed -i 's/^reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = \\["json"\\] }$/reqwest = { workspace = true }/' crates/runtime/Cargo.toml)

Bash(sed -i 's/^reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = \\["json", "stream", "socks", "rustls-tls"\\] }$/reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["stream", "socks", "rustls-tls"] }/' crates/providers/Cargo.toml)
Bash(sed -i 's/^reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = \\["json"\\] }$/reqwest = { workspace = true }/' crates/trajectory/Cargo.toml)
Bash(gh pr create --title 全面代码审查与安全修复：异步锁、XSS、CI、依赖统一 --body ' *)
Bash(awk '/^\\/\\/ -+$/{ if\(prev\) print prev; prev=NR; next } { prev=0 }' builtin_handlers.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/ToolError::execution_failed\("未找到显示器"\)/ToolError::execution_failed_for\("ComputerUse", "未找到显示器"\)/g' computer_use.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/ToolError::execution_failed\("截图命令执行失败"\)/ToolError::execution_failed_for\("ComputerUse", "截图命令执行失败"\)/g' computer_use.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/ToolError::invalid_input\("todos 必须是数组"\)/ToolError::invalid_input_for\("TodoWrite", "todos 必须是数组"\)/g' todo_write.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/ToolError::invalid_input\("questions 必须是数组"\)/ToolError::invalid_input_for\("AskUserQuestion", "questions 必须是数组"\)/g' todo_write.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/ToolError::execution_failed\("无效的 Notebook 格式"\)/ToolError::execution_failed_for\("NotebookEdit", "无效的 Notebook 格式"\)/g' todo_write.rs)
